zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabilia Grandison於大約1294年出生在英國賀福爾阿培頓時，她的父親Sir William de Grandison I40歲，母親Lady Sibyl de Tregoz24歲。她於1312年3月6日與Sir John De Pateshull在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1350年在英國英格蘭賀福爾阿培頓享年57歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾貝德福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabilia Grandison于大约1294年出生在英国賀福爾阿培頓时，她的父亲Sir William de Grandison I40岁，母亲Lady Sibyl de Tregoz24岁。她于1312年3月6日与Sir John De Pateshull在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1350年在英国英格兰賀福爾阿培頓享年57岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾貝德福德。

nameMeanings.name: Grandison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): said to be a habitational name from Granson on Lake Neuchâtel (Switzerland).

History: The first known bearer of this surname is Rigaldus de Grancione (flourished 1040). The name was taken to Britain by Otes de Grandison (died 1328) and his brother. They were among a group of Savoyards who settled in England when Henry III married a granddaughter of the Count of Savoy.

nameMeanings.name: Mabilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Carmino, Domenico, Luciano, Nicola.
Italian: altered form of Mabilia, from the old female personal name Mabile, from Latin Amabilis.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabilia Grandison was born about 1294, in Ashperton, Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir William de Grandison I, was 40 and her mother, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, was 24. She married Sir John De Pateshull on 6 March 1312, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died in 1350, in Ashperton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabilia Grandison est née environ 1294, à Ashperton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Grandison I, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John De Pateshull le 6 mars 1312, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1350, à Ashperton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabilia Grandison um 1294 in Ashperton, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Grandison I 40 und ihre Mutter Lady Sibyl de Tregoz 24. Sie hat am 6. März 1312 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England Sir John De Pateshull geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1350 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Ashperton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabilia Grandison è nata il circa 1294 nel Ashperton, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Sir William de Grandison I, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir John De Pateshull il 6 marzo 1312, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1350, nel Ashperton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Bedford, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabilia Grandisonが約1294年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアシュペルトンで生まれた時，父Sir William de Grandison Iは40歳，母Lady Sibyl de Tregozは24歳であった。1312年3月6日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでSir John De Pateshullと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1350年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアシュペルトンで57歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabilia Grandison(이)가 대략 1294년 영국 허퍼드실르 애쉬퍼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Grandison I(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Sibyl de Tregoz(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1312년 3월 6일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Sir John De Pateshull(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 애쉬퍼턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabilia Grandison nasceu aproximadamente 1294, em Ashperton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Grandison I, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John De Pateshull em 6 de março de 1312, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1350, em Ashperton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabilia Grandison родилась около 1294 г. в местности ашпиртон, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Grandison I было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John De Pateshull 6 марта 1312 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1350 г. в местности ашпиртон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mabilia Grandison nació aproximadamente 1294, en Ashperton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Grandison I, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Lady Sibyl de Tregoz, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir John De Pateshull el 6 de marzo de 1312, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió en 1350, en Ashperton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
